The flat features two well-appointed bedrooms, each with its own attached balconyone of which is in the living area, offering a scenic road view. The living cum dining area is spacious and ideal for entertaining, while the normal kitchen comes equipped with a piped gas connection and an attached utility area for added convenience. The interiors are finished with vitrified tiles and wooden flooring, creating a warm and inviting atmosphere throughout the home. Facilities This flat in Shivam Rudra Sky is designed to provide maximum comfort and convenience. It includes common covered parking, ensuring your vehicle is protected and secure. The property benefits from a reliable 24-hour water supply and 100 power backup, so youll never experience interruptions in essential services. Security is a top priority, with a dedicated security guard on duty and CCTV cameras installed throughout the building. For ease of access, the building is equipped with a lift, enhancing your overall living experience.Locality Situated in the vibrant area of Maninagar, Ahmedabad, this flat in Shivam Rudra Sky benefits from a prime location. The renowned Siddhi Vinayak Hospital serves as a key landmark nearby. Essential amenities are conveniently located within a 1 km radius, including schools, malls, and supermarkets. Public transport options are readily available, with buses and autos easily accessible for hassle-free commuting. Banks and ATMs are also close by for everyday financial needs. The Maninagar railway station is just a short walk away, providing excellent connectivity to other parts of the city and beyond.

resultList.dtldesc: 3 BHK Flat For Sale in Aashray Aurum, Shilaj Ambli, Ahmedabad.
